title: Community Giving
text:
Support Outreach Programs
Laboratory employees volunteer their time and effort to champion local and national causes each year and raise funds for charity. You can become a part of these efforts by donating to the STEM program fund of your choice through the MIT giving website.
Why Contribute?
The programs complement the Laboratory's mission of support to national security by helping ensure that the U.S. workforce remains preeminent in technology. All contributions, in all forms, are important to sustaining efforts to motivate and prepare students to become the next generation of scientists and engineers.
Gifts serve donors by providing tax benefits, a means to honor someone, a way to foster education, and the satisfaction of helping others.
Supporting our Local Communities
Laboratory employees walk, run, bike, hike, bake, and give to support local and national causes throughout the year.
The Laboratory community makes a difference for
Lincoln Laboratory Veterans Support Group
Support for deployed U.S. troops
Alzheimer's Association
TeamWalk for CancerCare
American Lung Association
Pan-Mass Challenge
American Heart Association
Greater Boston Food Bank
Natural disaster relief
5K Run for Service Dogs
Toys for Tots
Giving Tree
Santa for Seniors
